data.content: Implemented StepMetadata (owner, artifact, action_kind, review_hint) computed at read time from profile registry. Enriched on KnotView for CLI show/prompt/JSON. Extended bundle TOML/JSON parsers with review_hint. 13 tests, 806 total pass, 95.03% coverage. Branch: feat/knots-a9e6-owner-artifact-metadata, commit 3510b62.
